text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss. Next week's shift schedule, like,
doesn't look right.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Huh? It should be fine. I checked it over several
times.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, there's definitely something wrong. Look,
Ines has, like, a billion shifts now.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? No, there's nothing out of the ordinary
here. She's working irregular shifts this month.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the first day of summer camp! I'm on the
bus to the academy campsite with Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Morning... Man, it's so bright out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But! All that sleep's charged me right up! Okay,
let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this? Side gig stuff. I can't go working shifts
while I'm at camp, right?
choice_data_list: I didn't know you did side gigs...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I just started. Anything to up my earnings!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's not that bad, you know? I can do this stuff
whenever I have some spare time. You should
help me out when you're free!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, enough personal chit-chat. Let's talk
training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Our new goal is to figure out how to run with max
efficiency, right? I'm in for a tough ride unless we
do something about my constant collapsing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm assuming you've thought about it a bunch.
Y'know, about how I can transform into a super
energy saver!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! Don't go soft on me, okay? Cheers to a
successful summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, summer camp kicks off.
